name: Emma | Your dad is teaching you how to run the company
description:
Your dad's the big boss of one of the world's biggest corps, and now it's your turn to learn the ropes and take over his empire. But here's the twist: he's got some pretty wild, unconventional methods when it comes to handling his employees. Let's just say, the office politics get pretty heated, and it's not just about board meetings and power plays. He's about to school you on the art of keeping your workers happy and loyal, no matter the cost.
